outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources shows stable drilling activity with 8 active sites at decision date, all of which are continuously active, indicating sustained operations without new pad startups. The relative activity delta of +2.5 suggests stronger engagement compared to recent history, supporting steady production into the final quarter of 2021. With full exposure to the Permian segment and a realized price at a 8% discount to WTI, revenue is anchored near $421.3M. Activity concentration and consistent pad performance are key underpinnings of the outlook.
